query: show me total spend by vendor this year
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-procurement with maximo-overview as parent
Joins the vendor master COMPANIES on VENDOR + ORGID (vendor is org-scoped)
Sums a deliberately-chosen cost basis (LINECOST pretax vs LOADEDCOST), and excludes REVISD revision-history rows
Notes credit/debit memos and offers COMPMASTER rollup for enterprise-wide vendor spend
